zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Tucker於1652年5月7日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州查爾斯 希迪 庫迪查爾斯 希迪時，他的父親John Thomas Tucker25歲，母親Mary Allerton17歲。他與Elizabeth Coleman結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1704年9月26日在他的家鄉享年52歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州阿黑斯特塔克 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Tucker于1652年5月7日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州查爾斯 希迪 庫迪查爾斯 希迪时，他的父亲John Thomas Tucker25岁，母亲Mary Allerton17岁。他与Elizabeth Coleman结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1704年9月26日在他的家乡享年52岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州阿黑斯特塔克 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Tucker
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southwestern): occupational name from Middle English tuker(e), toker(e) ‘tucker, fuller’, a derivative of tuken ‘to torment, beat’ (Old English tūcian), for someone who fulled and finished cloth. This name for the occupation was characteristic of the West Country. Compare Fuller and Walker and see also Tuckerman .
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Tuachair ‘descendant of Tuachar’, a personal name composed of the elements tuath ‘people’ + car ‘dear, beloved’.
Americanized form of Jewish Tocker or Toker (see Tokarz ).

variants.name: Tooker
meanings: English (Devon) and Irish: variant of   Tucker  .

variants.name: Tuckerman
meanings: English: from Middle English tuker(e), toker(e) ‘tucker, fuller’ (see Tucker 1) + -man, either for a tucker, or for his servant or assistant.

variants.name: Fuller
meanings: English: occupational name for a dresser of cloth, from Middle English fuller ‘fuller of cloth’ (partly from Old English fullere, partly from Old French fouleor, foleur, Latin fullo). Raw cloth had to be fulled, i.e. scoured, cleansed, and thickened by beating or trampling it in water, a process also known as walking or tucking, hence the surnames Walker and Tucker alongside Fuller. These three terms and surnames are characteristic of different parts of England. In general, in Middle English, Fuller is southern and eastern, while Walker belongs to the west and north and Tucker is southwestern. Compare Fullen .
English: variant of Fullard with loss of -d.
German (Füller): occupational name for a person whose work involved filling, such as a dauber, or a nickname for a gourmand or glutton. Compare Filler .

variants.name: Swinger
meanings: English: occupational name, perhaps for a fuller, who finished cloth by beating it and stretching it on tenters. Middle English swyngere is not independently recorded but it appears to be an agent derivative of Middle English swingen ‘to beat, strike, punish, afflict (something)’. Compare the synonymous Tucker , an agent derivative of Middle English tuken ‘to torment, beat’. The earliest bearers of the name Swinger were wealthy townsmen.
In some instances probably an Americanized form of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic) Schwinger , or German Zwinger, a nickname from Middle High German zwinger ‘oppressor’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Tucker was born on 7 May 1652, in Charles City, Charles City County, Virginia, British Colonial America, his father, John Thomas Tucker, was 25 and his mother, Mary Allerton, was 17. He married Elizabeth Coleman. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 26 September 1704, in his hometown, at the age of 52, and was buried in Tucker Cemetery, Amherst, Virginia, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Tucker est né le 7 mai 1652, à Charles City, Charles City County, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, John Thomas Tucker, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Mary Allerton, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Coleman. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 26 septembre 1704, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Tucker Cemetery, Amherst, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique.

Mai 1652 in Charles City, Charles City County, Virginia, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Thomas Tucker 25 und seine Mutter Mary Allerton 17. Er hat Elizabeth Coleman geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 26. September 1704 im Alter von 52 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Tucker Cemetery, Amherst, Virginia, British Colonial America begraben.

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Tucker(이)가 1652년 5월 7일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 찰스 시티 카운티 찰스 시티에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Thomas Tucker(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Allerton(은)는 17세였다. 그는 Elizabeth Coleman(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1704년 9월 26일 그의 고향에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 아헤르스트 터커 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.7 May 1652–26 September 1704: 7 de maio de 1652–26 de setembro de 1704
pt.Norfolk, Virginia Colony: Norfolk, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Tucker nasceu em 7 de maio de 1652, em Charles City, Charles City County, Virginia, British Colonial America, seu pai, John Thomas Tucker, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Mary Allerton, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Coleman. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 26 de setembro de 1704, em sua cidade natal, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em Tucker Cemetery, Amherst, Virginia, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Tucker родился 7 мая 1652 г. в местности чарльс сити, чарльс сити коунти, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени John Thomas Tucker было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Allerton, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Coleman. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 26 сентября 1704 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности туккир кеметири, амхирст, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Tucker nació el 7 de mayo de 1652, en Charles City, Charles City County, Virginia, British Colonial America, su papá, John Thomas Tucker, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Mary Allerton, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Coleman. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 26 de septiembre de 1704, en su pueblo, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en Tucker Cemetery, Amherst, Virginia, British Colonial America.
